_comment: PROJECTION of a completed Claude Editorial Board review — the sanitized snapshot Iteration reads. Human-curated for now (no machine-readable board output yet); populate it by hand from a finished review. Committed to a PUBLIC repo, so keep it public-safe: SHORT diagnostic summaries only. NO manuscript body, NO private Claude transcript, NO API keys. The app never runs a review or calls an API — it only reads this file. Every field optional except schemaVersion; Iteration falls back to curated content when this file is absent. Convention: unresolvedQuestions[0] is the most consequential.

manuscript.title: Human-readable title
manuscript.status: in review — e.g. in review | revising | ready

reviewers.role: Evidence | Method | Structure | … (a short role name)
reviewers.diagnosis: One short, public-safe sentence — what this reviewer sees.
reviewers.recommendation: One short recommendation. Reviewers advise; they do not decide.

unresolvedQuestions: The open question the review left — most consequential first

rulings.on: What this ruling resolves (a short thread name)
rulings.decision: Your decision. A ruling is a decision record, not commentary.

deferredThreads: A thread set aside for later, in a few words
nextDecision: The next human decision this review is waiting on
